title: RSI, EMA & Volume Reversal By SmarTrader
author: smartrader19
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: RSI, EMA & Volume Reversal By SmarTrader by smartrader19.
Using RSI, 13 ema and volume to determine reversals.
Best used on 15 minute chart and larger time frame charts.
